title: Greenidge Generation Q2 2025 Earnings - $12.9M Revenue, Debt Reduction of 38.2%
text: Greenidge Generation Holdings Q2 2025 Earnings Report. Financial Results: Total Revenue $12.9 million. Net Loss $4.1 million. Adjusted EBITDA $0.4 million. Revenue Breakdown: Cryptocurrency Mining Revenue $4.2 million. Datacenter Hosting Revenue $6.0 million. Power and Capacity Revenue $2.6 million. Bitcoin Production and Operations: Total Bitcoin Production 110 BTC during the quarter. Debt Reduction Achievement: Senior unsecured debt reduced by 38.2% to $44.6 million. Reduction achieved through privately negotiated exchanges and public tender offer. Public tender offer was oversubscribed by 100%. Capital Structure Improvement: Significant reduction in debt burden strengthening balance sheet for future growth. Operational Context: Q2 2025 marked a period of transition with the company managing multiple strategic initiatives including debt restructuring and operational expansion. The positive adjusted EBITDA of $0.4 million reflected improved operational efficiency despite the net loss.
